name: Empire State Realty OP, L.P.
business: Empire State Realty OP, L.P. is a NYC-focused real estate investment trust that owns and operates office, retail, and multifamily properties, and the Empire State Building Observatory. The company generates revenue from leasing commercial and residential space and from ticket sales to the Observatory.
sellsTo: tenants of office, retail, and multifamily properties

exposures.sentence: our portfolio was comprised of approximately 7.9 million rentable square feet of office space, 0.8 million rentable square feet of retail space and 743 residential units, which are located in New York City.

the Empire State Building Observatory features its iconic Observatory, ranked the #1 Top Attraction in New York City for the fourth consecutive year in Tripadvisor s 2025 Travelers Choice Awards: Best of the Best Things to Do.
We license the use of the Empire State Building broadcasting mast to third-party television and radio broadcasters.
